site_tagline: Your City. Your Football. Your Culture.
hero_subtitle: The ultimate city & football culture guide for Manchester. Live scores, breaking news, city lifestyle, and curated products — all in one place.
news_not_found_desc: The article you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
footer_disclaimer: m.city is an independent digital media platform. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to any football club, association, or organization.
newsletter_desc: Get the best of m.city delivered to your inbox — breaking news, culture picks, and exclusive deals.
newsletter_privacy: By subscribing you agree to our Privacy Policy. Unsubscribe anytime.
whats_on_desc: Discover the best events, exhibitions, festivals, and live entertainment happening in Manchester.
where_to_stay_desc: Find the perfect place to stay — from luxury hotels to budget-friendly hostels in the heart of Manchester.
eat_drink_desc: Manchester's food scene is world-class. Discover the best restaurants, cafés, and bars the city has to offer.
deals_desc: Save money with exclusive deals on attractions, dining, hotels, and experiences across Manchester.
neighbourhoods_desc: Explore Manchester's diverse neighbourhoods — each with its own character, culture, and hidden gems.
free_things_desc: Manchester is full of free attractions — world-class museums, beautiful parks, and stunning architecture.
ideas_desc: Get inspired with curated guides, itineraries, and articles to help you explore Manchester like a local.
visitor_info_desc: Everything you need to know for your visit to Manchester — transport, weather, emergency numbers, and tips.
reviews_placeholder: Share your experience with this product...
reviews_thanks: Thank you! Your review has been submitted.
reviews_empty: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your thoughts!
review_error_text: Review text is too short (min. 5 characters).
